# Mia Kulin

> Singer, vocalist, and performer based in Ontario, Canada.

## About

Mia Kulin is a singer and vocalist available for live performances, private events, weddings, studio sessions, and collaborations.

## Contact

- Website: https://miakulin.com
- Instagram (Music): https://www.instagram.com/mia.k.music/
- Instagram (Personal): https://www.instagram.com/mia.kulin/

## Booking

For booking inquiries, visit https://miakulin.com/#booking or use the contact form on the website.

## Services

- Live Performance (solo or with band)
- Private Events (weddings, corporate, parties)
- Studio Sessions (vocals, songwriting, collaboration)
